name: Chocolate Mini Cheesecakes
recipeIngredient: 6 tablespoons of butter or margarine, melted
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the vanilla wafer crumbs, cocoa powder, and powdered sugar until combined.
2. Gradually add in the melted butter or margarine while stirring until a crumbly mixture forms.
3. Press the mixture into mini ramekins or cups to form the crusts.
4. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 10-15 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
5. Allow the crusts to cool completely before filling with cheesecake filling.
